description: Aasimar bear within their souls the light of the heavens, granting them celestial power and a touch of the divine.

trait.Darkvision.description: You can see in dim light within 60 feet of you as if it were bright light, and in darkness as if it were dim light.

trait.Celestial Resistance.description: You have resistance to Necrotic damage and Radiant damage.

trait.Healing Hands.description: As a Magic action, you touch a creature and roll a number of d4s equal to your Proficiency Bonus. The creature regains hit points equal to the total. Once per Long Rest.

trait.Languages.description: You can speak, read, and write Common and Celestial.
